title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
